title: Brand awareness and recognition
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Consumer — brand identity, recognition, loyalty, and top-of-mind awareness.
learningObjectives: Distinguish brand awareness, recognition, and recall.
Explain how branding builds consumer trust.
Analyse brand loyalty and switching behaviour.

simpleExplanation.title: Why brands matter
simpleExplanation.summary: Strong brands are recognised instantly, remembered first, and trusted — reducing perceived risk and driving repeat purchase.
steps: Recall — name brand from product category.
Loyalty — repeat purchase, resistance to rivals.

sections.content: **Brand awareness** (2.5.3) completes Consumer Psychology. Distinguish **recognition vs recall** in essays.
